plugins.name: hivespace
plugins.description: Work with your Hivespace team from a local coding session via the hivespace CLI: orient in team memory, read the drive and connected integrations, and contribute learnings back.

plugins.name: hivespace-seed-memory
plugins.description: Seed team memory from your local coding sessions: read past sessions, note knowledge other agents will benefit from, confirm each memory with the user, and write it to the team drive. Resolves the cold-start problem.
